languages.text: "Впервые вижу столько имплантов не на служителе Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "Впервые вижу столько имплантов не на служителе Омниссии".

languages.text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Впервые вижу столько имплантов не на служителе Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."
"You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."
"You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: "Ich habe noch nie eine derart augmentierte Person wie Euch gesehen, die kein Diener des Omnissiah war."
languages.original_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe noch nie eine derart augmentierte Person wie Euch gesehen, die kein Diener des Omnissiah war."

languages.text: “在非欧姆尼赛亚仆从里，你是我见过拥有最多植入物的人。”
languages.original_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: “在非欧姆尼赛亚仆从里，你是我见过拥有最多植入物的人。”

languages.text: « Je n'ai jamais vu une personne ayant subi autant de modifications corporelles en dehors des serviteurs de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai jamais vu une personne ayant subi autant de modifications corporelles en dehors des serviteurs de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: «Nunca había visto tantos aumentos en alguien que no fuese un siervo del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: «Nunca había visto tantos aumentos en alguien que no fuese un siervo del Omnissiah».

languages.text: "Hermesih'in bir hizmetkârı olmadığı hâlde şimdiye kadar gördüğüm en ağır şekilde ogmente edilmiş insansın."
languages.original_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in bir hizmetkârı olmadığı hâlde şimdiye kadar gördüğüm en ağır şekilde ogmente edilmiş insansın."

languages.text: 「オムニシアのしもべではない、最も改造された人間だ」
languages.original_text: "You are the most heavily augmented person I have ever seen who was not a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: 「オムニシアのしもべではない、最も改造された人間だ」
